affiliations.name: Former Institute of Phonetics, Saarland University
Former Institute of Phonetics, Saarland University

metadata.description:
The Saarbrücken Voice Database is a collection of German speech recordings used for research in the fields of phonetics, speech pathology, and computer-assisted speech analysis. The dataset includes so-called “normal” and pathological speech samples recorded under controlled conditions.

If you need to convert the .nsp files to .wav files, you can find a conversion tool here.

description.en: The Creative Commons Attribution license allows re-distribution and re-use of a licensed work on the condition that the creator is appropriately credited.

metadata.title: Saarbruecken Voice Database
